## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on the upcoming strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Organic traffic is growing,** driven by strong engagement (sessions \> GSC data) and growth in high-value keywords (Top 20).](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**A top article's 32% traffic drop** is likely due to keyword cannibalization from new content; consolidation is the strategy to fix it.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**New strategy: Target competitor keywords** (e.g., "Beekeeper alternative") to capture high-intent users, leveraging Yourco's key differentiators.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [**The content calendar will be expanded** to a monthly view to enable proactive planning and support Jessica's December absence.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review (Last 3 Months)

  - [**Organic Traffic:** Upward trend in sessions, which is a more reliable metric than GSC data post-Google's parameter limit changes.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Engagement:** High engaged sessions indicate users are finding and staying on pages.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Keyword Growth:** Strong growth in Top 20 keywords, which drive the most clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Subcluster Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**Strong Growth:** Scheduling & Call-offs, Templates.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**High-Impact Drop:** "Employee Survey Examples" traffic is down 32%.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
          - [**Hypothesis:** Keyword cannibalization from new articles (e.g., "Anonymous Employee Survey") is spreading traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
          - [**Action:** Investigate the mid-October refresh and confirm re-indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Consolidate fragmented survey content into comprehensive posts to improve ranking and traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [**Competitor Keywords:** Target high-intent searches like "Beekeeper alternative."](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture users actively seeking alternatives to established tools.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Differentiators:** Highlight Yourco's key advantages, such as being web-based (vs. app-only) for frontline workers without smartphones.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**Industry-Specific Content:** Create "Frontline Intelligence" content tailored to specific industries (e.g., logistics, manufacturing).](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Align with trending LLM searches and top articles, which show high user interest in industry-specific applications.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

### Workflow & Planning

  - [**GrowthX AI Workflow Upgrade:**](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [**Change:** Yourco's account is on a new, more "agentic" workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [**Impact:** Requires more detailed "artifacts" (e.g., separate writing guidelines, proofreading checklists) to ensure high-quality outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [**Process:** Feedback from Jessica's comments is manually reviewed before being integrated into the AI system.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Content Calendar:**](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Decision:** Expand the calendar to a monthly view, replacing the "Buffer Week" tab.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Proactively plan content for November and December, supporting Jessica's absence and GrowthX's holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [Investigate the "Employee Survey Examples" traffic drop and confirm re-indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [Expand the content calendar to a monthly view.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [Research competitor keywords (e.g., "Beekeeper alternative") for new content ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [**Jessica & Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [Finalize the November/December content calendar before Jessica's absence.](https://fathom.video/share/sKA-BjgmWr6PzK4cPPBNLHoPKJvutsKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
